pytorch.reason: torch matrix multiplication for SU(2) and SO(3) rotor composition — load-bearing for ordering test

pyg.reason: graph edges handled by rustworkx; PyG message passing not required for G-tower ordering test

z3.reason: z3 UNSAT proof guard confirms commutativity constraint excluded for cross-axis G-tower rotors

cvc5.reason: z3 covers SMT non-commutativity check; cvc5 redundant on real arithmetic ordering constraints

sympy.reason: symbolic SO(3) commutator witnesses structural non-commutativity of G-tower reduction

clifford.reason: Cl(3,0) rotor multiplication directly tests AB vs BA composition ordering

geomstats.reason: geomstats SO3 framing attempted; torch fallback used for composition ordering check

e3nn.reason: e3nn Wigner D-matrix ordering check probes G-tower non-commutativity at representation level

rustworkx.reason: rustworkx DAG encodes G-tower directed ordering topology for triple reduction

xgi.reason: xgi hypergraph encodes shared ordering constraint across all three G-tower group layers

toponetx.reason: TopoNetX CellComplex encodes G-tower triple (SO3/SU2/Sp1) as oriented 2-cell topology

gudhi.reason: gudhi Rips complex persistence probe on G-tower triple abstract geometry

P1_clifford_so3_noncommutative.note: Cl(3,0) rotor composition A∘B ≠ B∘A — non-commutativity survives Clifford algebra probe

P2_z3_noncommutativity_unsat.note: z3 UNSAT confirms commutativity constraint cannot be satisfied — ordering excluded

P3_sympy_noncommutativity_witness.note: sympy confirms [Rx, Rz] ≠ 0 symbolically — non-commutativity is structural

P4_geomstats_so3_composition_order.note: geomstats backend issue (module 'geomstats' has no attribute 'setup_backend'); torch matrices confirm AB≠BA with diff=1.062393

P5_su2_composition_noncommutative.note: SU(2) x-z rotor composition survives non-commutativity probe — middle G-tower layer confirmed

P6_e3nn_wigner_ordering.note: e3nn Wigner D-matrices for different angle orderings differ — equivariant rep confirms ordering matters

N1_same_axis_commutes_sat.note: identical rotor on same axis survives commutativity check — z3 SAT confirms same-axis excluded from non-commutativity claim

N2_clifford_same_axis_commutes.note: Cl(3,0): same-axis z-z rotors commute exactly — excluded from non-commutativity probe

N3_sp1_su2_ordering_identical.note: Sp(1) and SU(2) ordering diffs are identical — both excluded from independent non-commutativity claims; reduction is structural

B1_identity_commutes_sat.note: identity SU(2) rotor commutes with all elements — I*R = R*I confirmed at boundary

B2_pi_rotation_boundary.note: π-rotation x-z boundary survives non-commutativity — large-angle rotors do not commute

B3_rustworkx_gtower_dag.note: rustworkx DAG encodes SO(3)→SU(2)→Sp(1) reduction order — topology survives directed acyclic probe

B4_toponetx_gtower_cell_complex.note: TopoNetX CellComplex encodes G-tower triple as oriented 2-cell — topology survives higher-rank probe

B5_gudhi_gtower_persistence.note: gudhi Rips persistence on G-tower abstract points — triple survives topological filtration probe

B6_xgi_gtower_shared_constraint.note: xgi hypergraph encodes shared non-commutativity constraint across G-tower triple
